metadata.description: A personal marketplace of Claude Code plugins by Manuel Schurr.

plugins.name: professional-twin
plugins.description: Build and use a personal repository of your professional self — your identity, history, values, and direction — so Claude can help you apply for jobs, prepare for interviews, and reflect on your career.

plugins.name: tutor
plugins.description: A personal adaptive learning plugin. Create a custom course on any topic and study it through guided, expert-tutor-style sessions inside Claude Code.
